ownerStandard: Sway must prove the complete customer and performer live-room loop in one cohesive production experience.

capabilities.label: One account can use customer and performer sides
capabilities.holdReason: Universal account and Pro Mode code exist without a current independent production journey packet.

capabilities.label: Performer starts and shares a room; customer joins
capabilities.holdReason: Room and QR/link paths exist without current end-to-end production evidence on the deployed build.

capabilities.label: Customer requests, tips, boosts, pays, and sees status
capabilities.holdReason: Runtime and contracts exist without a current production transaction proof packet for every action.

capabilities.label: Performer queue control, role isolation, moderation, and retry safety
capabilities.holdReason: Code and contracts are not a current production role, moderation, degraded-network, and duplicate-retry evidence packet.

capabilities.label: Earnings, end-room closeout, and recap
capabilities.holdReason: The complete production closeout outcome is not independently recorded for the current deployed build.
